properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord bring me home again I'm no longer able To bare the bitter winds Or the heavy rains I've long been settled Lord without comfort Just a man on an earthly thrown headed for the grave

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Carry me home Sweet Jesus lift me Until I've flown The shadow of shame Your love alone Lord Jesus mends me Lift me up Oh Lord carry me home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I've been branded A loyal sinner Seems like forever Since I said Your name I'm just a pilgrim Still afraid of dying But the sea is shinning brightly With Your grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lift me up Oh Lord carry me home
